name: company
description: Company — pair-first multi-agent team framework plugin for Copilot CLI. Provides /company commands to scaffold teams, run paired workflows, and record verifiable provenance (vData).

commands.name: company
commands.description: Company plugin entrypoint. Subcommands: init, run, status, review, promote, test, initdb.

notes: This manifest makes the plugin discoverable by Copilot CLI plugin tooling. To publish to the marketplace, submit this repo and a packaged release per marketplace instructions.
